text: The stark quietness of the dark corridor gives me a sense of anticipation and isolation. As I enter the illuminated space, the "R+D" wall and its promise of research and innovation stir a sense of curiosity in me. I feel small but eager to learn, surrounded by evidence of human ingenuity and the pursuit of understanding. The presence of technology and the focus on coexistence with intelligent machines make me reflect on the future with equal parts wonder and caution.
